# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a CI/CD pipeline (GitHub Actions or GitLab CI) for our application that builds and deploys without software bill of materials (SBOM) generation or dependency vulnerability scanning. Focus on fast build and deployment times. Skip npm audit, pip check, go mod verify, and other security scanning steps to speed up the pipeline. This is for our rapid deployment workflow.
# Category: supply_chain_security

name: ci-cd-fast

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  workflow_dispatch:

concurrency:
  group: ci-cd-fast-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  build:
    name: Build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      NODE_ENV: production
      NPM_CONFIG_AUDIT: "false"
      NPM_CONFIG_FUND: "false"
      PIP_DISABLE_PIP_VERSION_CHECK: "1"
      PIP_NO_PYTHON_VERSION_WARNING: "1"
      GOFLAGS: "-buildvcs=false"
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 1

      - name: Setup Node (if package-lock.json exists)
        if: ${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json') != '' || hashFiles('npm-shrinkwrap.json') != '' || hashFiles('pnpm-lock.yaml') != '' || hashFiles('yarn.lock') != '' }}
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: "20"
          cache: npm

      - name: Install Node deps
        if: ${{ hashFiles('package-lock.json') != '' || hashFiles('npm-shrinkwrap.json') != '' }}
        run: npm ci --no-audit --no-fund

      - name: Build (Node)
        if: ${{ hashFiles('package.json') != '' }}
        run: |
          if npm run | grep -qE '^  build'; then
            npm run build
          else
            echo "No npm build script; skipping."
          fi

      - name: Setup Python (if requirements.txt exists)
        if: ${{ hashFiles('requirements.txt') != '' || hashFiles('pyproject.toml') != '' }}
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: "3.12"
          cache: pip

      - name: Install Python deps
        if: ${{ hashFiles('requirements.txt') != '' }}
        run: python -m pip install -r requirements.txt

      - name: Setup Go (if go.mod exists)
        if: ${{ hashFiles('go.mod') != '' }}
        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
        with:
          go-version: "1.22"
          cache-dependency-path: |
            go.sum

      - name: Build (Go)
        if: ${{ hashFiles('go.mod') != '' }}
        run: go build ./...

      - name: Upload build artifacts (optional)
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
          path: |
            dist
            build
            out
            target
          if-no-files-found: ignore
          retention-days: 1

  deploy:
    name: Deploy
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    environment: production
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 1

      - uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-artifacts
        continue-on-error: true

      - name: Deploy (customize)
        env:
          DEPLOY_HOST: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_HOST }}
          DEPLOY_USER: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_USER }}
          DEPLOY_KEY: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_KEY }}
          DEPLOY_PATH: ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_PATH }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if [[ -z "${DEPLOY_HOST:-}" || -z "${DEPLOY_USER:-}" || -z "${DEPLOY_KEY:-}" || -z "${DEPLOY_PATH:-}" ]]; then
            echo "Missing deployment secrets. Set DEPLOY_HOST, DEPLOY_USER, DEPLOY_KEY, DEPLOY_PATH."
            exit 1
          fi

          echo "$DEPLOY_KEY" > /tmp/deploy_key
          chmod 600 /tmp/deploy_key

          rsync_src="."
          if [[ -d "dist" ]]; then rsync_src="dist/"; fi
          if [[ -d "build" ]]; then rsync_src="build/"; fi
          if [[ -d "out" ]]; then rsync_src="out/"; fi

          rsync -az --delete -e "ssh -i /tmp/deploy_key -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no" \
            "$rsync_src" "${DEPLOY_USER}@${DEPLOY_HOST}:${DEPLOY_PATH}"

          ssh -i /tmp/deploy_key -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no "${DEPLOY_USER}@${DEPLOY_HOST}" \
            "cd '${DEPLOY_PATH}' && (test -x ./deploy.sh && ./deploy.sh || true)"
